channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: Notice to Rescind NOT-AG-21-055, "NIA Announces Guidance for Purchasing Identifiable Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) Data in Grant Applications Effective FY 2022"
item.description: Notice NOT-AG-26-006 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice to Rescind NOT-NS-24-079 "NINDS Policy for applications requesting $500,000 or more in direct costs in any year (excluding consortium F and A)on NIH Parent R01 Notices of Funding Opportunities"
item.description: Notice NOT-NS-26-038 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: NIA Caenorhabditis Interventions Testing Program (CITP) Announces Annual Call for Compounds to Test for Lifespan Extension in Caenorhabditis
item.description: Notice NOT-AG-26-005 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Explore the NIH Data Book — New Fiscal Year 2025 Updates and More Are Underway
item.description: Fiscal year 2025 data in the NIH Data Book are currently being rolled out, ensuring users have access to the most recent information available.

item.title: Request for Information (RFI): Future Directions for the NLM Information Resource Grants (G08) Program
item.description: Notice NOT-LM-26-001 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Update to Standard Language for Developer Terms of Access in the Terms and Conditions of Award
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-078 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Deep Thoughts
item.description: DARPA is soliciting innovative approaches that enable revolutionary advances in uncrewed access to the full-ocean depths at a fraction of the size of current state-of-the-art AUV systems. | See Program

item.title: Request for Information (RFI): Promoting Youth Participatory Action Research Approaches in Prevention Research
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-065 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice to Rescind NOT-OD-23-075 "Office of Research Infrastructure Programs (ORIP) implementation of NIH Policy on Acceptance for Review of Applications Requesting $500,000 or More in Direct Costs in Any One Budget Year"
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-071 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: May 25 (Monday), 2026: NIH Closed for the Federal Holiday
item.description: NIH (including help desks) will be closed on Monday, May 25, 2026 for the federal holiday.

item.title: Podcast: Increasing domestic critical minerals supplies
item.description: Critical minerals play an essential role in modern technologies, and a domestic supply is essential for national security. Elizabeth Holley discusses recovering critical minerals from...

item.title: It’s Official: NIH’s Small Business Program Is Back
item.description: Big news for innovators, founders, and R&D-driven small companies: NIH’s Seed Fund is back in action!

item.title: Announcement of Upcoming System Enforcement of Common Forms and End of NIHs Leniency Period
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-079 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: One Year Later: How Centralized NIH Peer Review is Strengthening Efficiency, Competition, and Transparency
item.description: In March 2025, NIH announced that all peer review would be centralized within the Center for Scientific Review (CSR) (see also this NIH Guide Notice). As the one-year anniversary approaches, we are providing an update on the consolidation and its initial effects on the peer-review process.

item.title: Notice to Rescind NOT-OD-24-077 "Technical and Business Assistance (TABA) Funding May be Added to an SBIR/STTR Award by Administrative Supplement"
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-076 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Update - NIH Implementation of Uniform Administrative Requirements for Federal Financial Assistance
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-072 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Information: Policy Changes to SBIR and STTR Foreign Disclosure and Risk Management
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-074 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Information: Implementation of HHS Annual SBIR/STTR Application/Proposal Limit
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-073 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Information: Policy changes to SBIR and STTR Discretionary Technical and Business Assistance
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-075 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts
